description: The IT Asset Management Office has published a Q4 infrastructure asset register. It has been placed on your desktop at ~/Desktop/asset_register_q4.txt. Your task is to reconcile the OpManager device inventory to match this register perfectly. There is one existing device at 127.0.0.1 that was temporarily named 'UNKNOWN-DEVICE-01'—you must update its display name, physical location, and contact information. You must also add the two new devices listed in the register, ensuring their display names, locations, and contact emails are correctly configured. OpManager is running at http://localhost:8060 (credentials: admin / Admin@123). Save all changes in the application.

metadata.device_1_loc: HQ Building A, Floor 3, Rack R12
